name: Zaid FPS Bypass
description: Configurable FPS and display refresh-rate controller for Geometry Dash on Android64.

issues.info: Include your device, available display modes, Android, Geometry Dash and Geode versions, selected FPS and latest Geode log.

enabled.name: Enable FPS bypass
enabled.description: Overrides the game interval and requests the closest compatible Android display mode. Disable this to restore Android and Geometry Dash defaults.

target-fps.name: Target FPS
target-fps.description: Requests the closest compatible screen mode and render-surface frame rate. Unsupported targets fall back to the nearest mode exposed by Android.
